name: Margonem Anti-Stasis (AFK Ghost Dismisser)
description: Automatically detects and dismisses the AFK/stasis state in Margonem by simulating movement. Runs silently in background.

name: Margonem NI E2 Auto-Attacker
description: Listens for Elite 2 (E2) mobs, simulates canvas clicks to walk to them and attack in Margonem NI.

name: Margonem NI Mob Auto-Attacker
description: Listens for a specific mob, simulates canvas clicks to walk to it and attack in Margonem NI.

name: Margonem NI Mob Notifier
description: Monitors Margonem maps for Heros and Titans and sends rich Discord webhook notifications with role/user pings. Features a premium glassmorphic control HUD.

name: Margonem NI Path Follower
description: Follows configured waypoint routes and gateway transitions without attacking.
